name: Nested Object Structure Change
description: Backend changed nested object structure without updating OpenAPI spec

backend.implementation: res.json({ customerId: 'CUST-456', address: { streetAddress: '123 Main St', city: 'San Francisco', postalCode: '94102', country: 'USA' } })

frontend.usage: const street = data.address.street; // undefined, const zip = data.address.zipCode; // undefined

fields.userImpact: Address display incomplete. Street address not shown, causing shipping and billing issues.
Postal code missing from address display. May affect shipping calculations and address validation.
